summary: PR #633 syntactic sugar implementation complete. Applied notation replacements (¬, ∧, ∨, →, ↔, ⊥) to 11 Propositional/ files on pr1/foundations-logic branch. Added missing biconditional notation to Defs.lean. Fixed a bug introduced by the previous agent in MCS.lean (¬φ ∈ S was being parsed as Prop-level negation instead of Proposition.neg membership; fixed by adding parentheses). Responded to reviewer comment r3403944952 explaining Pi-type binder constraint. All 7 CI steps passed. Committed (cd6b46d3) and pushed to pr1/foundations-logic.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary with plan deviations, CI results, and notes on Pi-type constraint

key_deviations: MCS.lean parenthesization fix: previous agent wrote ¬φ ∈ S (parsed as ¬(φ ∈ S)), corrected to (¬φ) ∈ S
HilbertDerivedRules.lean: ¬C :: Γ (parsed as ¬(C :: Γ)), corrected to (¬C) :: Γ
Equivalence.lean: 0 changes (all occurrences in Pi-type binder positions, unsafe to replace)
Notation is Unicode (¬, ∧, ∨, →, ↔) not ASCII as research report suggested
